subject: [DCAEGEN2] Update cm-container and consul-loader
commit_message:
[DCAEGEN2] Update cm-container and consul-loader

cm-container 4.2.0 fixes a restart issue
consul-loader-container 1.1.0 adds functionality
needed for deploying DCAE microservices with Helm

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2581
Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-2616
Signed-off-by: Jack Lucas <jflos@sonoris.net>
Change-Id: I3999767d51ce7135c2783a7eee6dadd0b3270d4f

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/360/ )
